name: Azania Rises
overview: In the year 2070, most of Africa’s 54 African countries resolve to form a single, united nation.  Now, in 2100, the dream is taking shape - Azania is rising!  After 30 years of peace, the threat of conflict once again looms over Azania. Nomala Kamwendo (21), a headstrong, naive Murwi soldier, sees this as her chance to prove she is Azania’s next hero. However, when she discovers there’s a darker, more sinister force from within her own family that threatens Azania’s existence, she learns the true cost of peace and what truly makes a hero.
